response.justification: Bogdan is a highly experienced Staff Engineer with recent, direct experience building AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators, aligning perfectly with the role's AI-driven focus. He has a proven track record designing high-throughput, low-latency microservices and brings strong technical leadership from previous Staff and Founder roles. While he lacks the explicitly required Python experience, his polyglot background, deep TypeScript expertise, and systems thinking make him a highly promising candidate worth interviewing.
strengths: Direct hands-on experience developing AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators.
Demonstrated expertise in high-throughput distributed systems, previously handling millions of requests per second.
Strong Staff-level ownership and technical strategy experience, complemented by an entrepreneurial background.
concerns: Lacks the 'must-have' strong Python experience listed in the job description, which may require a ramp-up period.
Recent Staff role at re:cinq was relatively brief (6 months) before entering a career gap.
Heavy reliance on DLang for high-performance backend systems rather than more mainstream enterprise languages.
